## FolderQueryOptions.ancestor property

Transitive ancestor match — walks the parent chain looking for any folder whose name or primary key matches. When an array is given, semantics are "any of" (OR) across the whole chain.

**Signature:**

```typescript
ancestor?: string | string[] | undefined;
```
